note_on_run_time: Cron actually fired at 08:02 PHT (00:02 UTC). The 13:00 PHT schedule referenced in the task prompt does not match the active scheduled-tasks entry. Recommend reconciling cron expression with intended PHT slot.

google_sheets.note: No Google Sheets connector is listed as active in campaign_state.json or in the prior MORNING_METRICS readiness. The lead form responses sheet has not been identified, named, or linked in any state file. Google Drive MCP is reachable, but the specific lead-capture sheet must be created (or pointed to) and its ID stored in campaign_state.json before live polling can begin.

wati.note: campaign_state.json: wati.status='needs_account'. User must create account at app.wati.io and supply Client ID. Until then no inbound WhatsApp leads can be ingested and no HOT-lead alerts can be pushed to the sales agent.

hubspot.note: campaign_state.json: hubspot.status='not_setup'. No CRM destination exists for new leads. Deal pipeline, lifecycle stages, and owner routing all undefined.

brevo.note: campaign_state.json: brevo.status='needs_account'. Used here only as a passive lead source via email replies/unsubscribes; primary use is outbound. Account creation still pending.

meta_lead_forms.note: Meta Ads MCP is reachable (account 2015125296073673 ACTIVE) but no Lead Ads forms have been created on the Blue Everest Asset Group page. If the campaign plans to use FB/IG Lead Ads, forms and the CRM webhook must be defined before launch.

google_ads_lead_form.note: Google Ads has 0 campaigns and no Lead Form extension or asset. Same gap as Meta.

expected_lead_schema.source: Google Sheets (lead form responses) and WATI inbound

field_definitions.submitted_at: ISO 8601 timestamp (Asia/Manila preferred, must include timezone)
field_definitions.name: Full name, free text
field_definitions.email: Valid email; deduplication key together with phone
field_definitions.phone: E.164 with country code (e.g., +972...), required for WhatsApp follow-up
field_definitions.country: ISO country code or full name; expected values include IL and PH
field_definitions.investment_amount: Numeric. IL: ILS. PH: PHP. Currency inferred from country/language
field_definitions.utm_source: facebook | google | instagram | direct | organic | whatsapp
field_definitions.utm_campaign: IL-1, IL-2, PH-1, etc. matching active campaign codes

expected_lead_schema.hot_lead_action: Send WATI alert to sales agent and mark priority='HOT' in lead_updates.json. Never contact the lead directly.

blockers: Phase is PRE_LAUNCH and simulation=true. No live lead intake by design.
No Google Sheets lead-capture sheet has been identified or linked. Sheet ID, tab name, and column order are all unknown.
WATI account not created. Cannot ingest WhatsApp leads or send HOT-lead alerts to sales.
HubSpot not set up. No CRM destination, no deal pipeline, no owner routing.
Brevo account not created. Email-based lead signals unavailable.
No Meta Lead Ads forms or Google Ads Lead Form assets configured. UTM-tagged web form is the only planned channel and the form itself is not yet defined.
primevilla.ph: Meta Pixel 1599211187973958 and Google Tag AW-18095957436 not installed. Conversion attribution is offline, which also breaks lead-source enrichment.
Sales agent identity, phone number, and escalation SLA are not recorded in any state file.
suggested_actions: Create a dedicated Google Sheet named 'Panglao Prime Villas - Lead Form Responses' with the columns listed in expected_lead_schema, share it with the Cowork Google Drive connector, and record sheetId + tab name in campaign_state.json under platforms.lead_sources.google_sheets.
Stand up the website lead form on primevilla.ph (or a hosted form) that writes to that sheet, with UTM passthrough (utm_source, utm_medium, utm_campaign, utm_content) and language field.
Create the WATI account, capture Client ID, define the inbound-message intake template, and add the sales agent's WhatsApp number to campaign_state.json under sales_agent.

Create the HubSpot portal (or alternative CRM), define a single 'Panglao Prime Villas' pipeline with stages: New -> Qualified -> Meeting Scheduled -> Reservation Paid -> Contract -> Closed, and define the owner.
Create the Brevo account and a 'Leads' contact list with custom attributes matching expected_lead_schema.
Create at least one Meta Lead Ads form and one Google Ads Lead Form asset with the same field set, so paid channels can capture leads without bouncing through the website.
Install Meta Pixel and Google Tag on primevilla.ph (snippet at _status/tracking_codes_install.html) so source/medium attribution lands on every lead.
Add a 'sales_agent' object to campaign_state.json: {name, whatsapp, email, hours_pht, escalation_sla_minutes}.
Once all of the above are green, set start_date + go_live_date, flip simulation=false, and let LEAD_CHECK begin real polling at 13:00 PHT.
live_lead_collection_skip_reason: Phase is PRE_LAUNCH and simulation=true. No live lead intake configured. Cannot poll a sheet or a WATI inbox that does not exist.
